text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Pretty sure it was a hawk… Never thought 
I'd see such a big bird on campus.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Maybe birds of prey find the city 
more hospitable nowadays.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I'd like to see that gallant 
silhouette again sometime.
